* exclusive of GST and other Govt. Taxes as applicable, will be levied as per the existing tax laws. There are no additional CRA charges for the maintenance of Tier II account. Also, please note that the fee structure may change from time to time as may be decided by PFRDA.
# Persistency fee is payable to such POPs to which the subscriber is associated for more than six months in a financial year.
1. Minimum per transaction contribution is ₹ 500/- and minimum annual contribution is ₹1000/-
